cases.title: PDF resume imports without parser crash
cases.expected: The PDF imports without crashing and produces usable structured resume data.

cases.title: DOCX resume imports without parser crash
cases.expected: The DOCX imports without crashing and produces usable structured resume data.

cases.title: Unsupported file type is rejected safely
cases.expected: The app shows a safe error and does not save corrupted resume data.

cases.title: Corrupt resume file fails gracefully
cases.expected: The parser fails gracefully with no crash and no partial/corrupt profile save.

cases.title: Two-column resume layout preserves major sections
cases.expected: Major sections such as experience, education, skills, and contact details are not mixed or lost.

cases.title: Parsed resume data remains fake/anonymized in fixtures
